title: Bridge Essay: Theta activity and meditative states: spectral changes during concentrative medi

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Theta activity and meditative states: spectral changes during concentrative meditation.** — Cogn Process. PMID: 19626355. DOI: 10.1007/s10339-009-0272-0. Brain oscillatory activity is associated with different cognitive processes and plays acritical role in meditation. In this study, we investigated the temporal dynamics of oscillatory changes during Sahaj Samadhi meditation (aconcentrative form of meditation that is part of Sudarshan Kriya yoga). EEG was recorded during Sudarshan Kriya yoga meditation for meditators and relaxation for controls.
